flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Front Range Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Front Range Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.5k → $17.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Front Range Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Front Range Community College rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (25.8% → 35.4%).
